verses.text: Tua ciangin Kumpi Darias in thu pia a, Babylon khua sunga lai manphate a kisen'na innte sung kizong hi
Ahi zongin Babylon khua sungah na omlo a, Media gamsung kumpi khuapi Ekbatana-ah laizial khat kimu a, tua sungah hih a nuai-a bangin a kiciamteh kimu hi

“Kumpi Sairas' kum khatna kumin Jerusalem khua-a Pasian' biakinn tawh kisai-in kumpipa in thu pia hi: Biakna kipia-in meihal biakna a kipaipihna munah biakinn lamsak kik un. A san'na pi sawmkua, a vai pi sawmkua mah hi ding a
a kawm pen suang thuap thum leh sing thuap khat tawh a kibawl, thuap li hi ding hi. Hih sum beinate ahih leh kumpi sum panin kipia ding hi

Nebukhadnezzar in Jerusalem biakinn panin lakhia-in Babylon-ah a hong tun'pih Pasian' biakinn sunga om kham leh ngun tawh kibawl umlebeelte zong kipiakik ding hi. Tuate khempeuh Jerusalem biakinn-ah kipuakik ding a, Pasian' biakinn sunga a omna mun mun ciatah kikoihkik ding hi,” ci-in kigelh hi
Tua ciangin Kumpi Darias in hih bangin thu a pia hi: “Tu-in Eufratis Gungal gam a uk Tattenai, Shetharbozenai, leh Eufratis Gungal gamsung a vaan na lawmte, tua mun panin na kihemkhia ding uh hi
Judah mi a ukpa leh a upate in hih Pasian' biakinn a lamkik theihna dingun na tuaci omsak ding uh hi. Ama mun ngei mahah a biakinn lamsak kik un

Hih a kigen Pasian' biakinn a kilamkik theihna dingin hih Judah upate-a' dingin na hih dingte uh zong thu kong pia hi. Hih nasepna a mawk khawllohna dingin, Eufratis Gungal gamsung panin a kingah siahte ahi kumpi sum sung panin beina khempeuh a cingin kipia ding hi

Vantung Pasian' tungah meihal biakna-in piak dingin a kisam khempeuh — bawngtalnote, tuutalte, ahih kei leh tuunote na pia ding uh a, Jerusalem-a siampite' hong ngetna bangin mangbuh, ci, leenggahzu, ahih kei leh sathaute, kitasam loin nisimin amaute tungah piasak un
Tua hi leh amaute in vantung Pasian' tungah a namtui biaknate pia-in kumpipa leh a tapate' nuntakna ding thu hong ngetsak thei ding uh hi

Tua thamloin, mi khatpeuh in hih thupiakna a siatsak leh ama inn panin a innkam khat kidawhkhiat sakin tua tungah amah kihen cipin kisatgawp ding a, tua banah a inn zong a kisuksiatna ding thu kong pia thuah lai hi

Hih ka thupiakna a siasak nuam, Jerusalem-a Pasian' biakinn a susia nuam kumpi khatpeuh ahi a, mi khatpeuh ahi zongin a om leh, ama min omna dinga tua mun a bawl Pasian in tua mipa lawnthal ta hen. Keimah Darias in thu kong pia hi. Ka thupiak bang teekteekin sep ding ahi hi,” a ci hi.
Tua ciangin Kumpi Darias in amaute tungah a thupiak bang teekteekin Eufratis Gungal gamsung a uksawn Tattenai, Shetharbozenai, leh a lawmte in sem uh hi

Tua hi a, kamsang Haggai leh Iddo' suan Zekhariah' thugenna hangin Judah upate in a biakinn lam uh zom suakin mavang uh hi. Israel Pasian' sawlna leh Persia kumpi Sairas leh Darias leh Artakzaksis-te' thupiakna tawh amaute in a biakinn lam uh a zo uh hi
Tua hi a, Kumpi Darias' kum gukna, Adar kha a ni sawmlethum ni-in a biakinn kizo hi
Tua ciangin Israel mite, siampite, Levi mite, leh sal a suaksa a hong ciahkik mi khempeuh in lungdamna lianpi tawh Pasian' biakinn apna a bawl uh hi

Amaute in Pasian' biakinn apna-in bawngtal za khat, tuutal za nih, leh tuuno za li go uh a, mawhna hanga biakna dingin Israel-te khempeuh-a' dingin a minam phazah tawh kizui-in keeltal sawmlenih a pia uh hi
Tua ciangin Moses laibu sungah a kigelh bangin Jerusalem-a Pasian' nasepna dingin siampite amau' pan'mun ngei-ah pangsak uh a, Levi mite amau' nasepna ngei-ah a semsak kik uh hi.
A kha masa a ni sawmleli ni-in sal a suaksa a hong ciahkik mite in Paisan Pawi a bawl uh hi

Siampite leh Levi mite a vekpi-un kisian'suah khin uh a, a vekpi-un zehsiang khin uh hi. Tua hi a, amaute in sal suaksa a hong ciahkik khempeuh-a' ding, a siampipihte uh leh amau mahmah-a' dingin Paisan tuuno a go uh hi
Salsuahna panin a hong ciahkik Israel-te leh Israel Pasian, Topa a bia dingin tua gama midang tengte leh a nitna uh pan amau leh amau a kihemkhia tawm mite khempeuh in tua Paisan Pawi an a ne uh hi

Tua hi a, amaute in lungdamna tawh ni sagih sung silngo sawhloh anlum pawi a bawl uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amau' lungdamna ding a om theihna dingin Topa in Assiria kumpipa' lungsim amau' tungah a nuam dingin a bawlsak hi. Tua ahih manin Israel Pasian ahi Pasian' biakinn a sepna uhah kumpipa in amaute a huh hi.
